data.title: Nxera Pharma will receive a US$3.6 million milestone payment from Centessa for the development of ORX142 for neurological disorders.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, Nxera Pharma Co., Ltd. disclosed that Centessa Pharmaceuticals reached a significant milestone in the early development of ORX142, an orally administered orexin receptor 2 agonist for neurological and neurodegenerative disorders. As part of their research collaboration, Centessa will pay Nxera $3.6 million, which will be reflected as revenue in Q4 FY2025. Nxera, traded as TSE 4565, acknowledged the achievement and the financial impact it will have on the company.

data.title: Agriculture version of crypto bill markup pushed to end of January. Senate Banking Committee's version on track. Boozman cites bipartisan support.
data.description: In an update, the Senate Agriculture Committee, under the leadership of Sen. John Boozman (R-AR), has decided to postpone the markup of the agriculture version of a cryptocurrency market structure bill to the last week of January. This delay aims to allow more time for bipartisan discussions and refinement before moving forward. Despite citing "meaningful progress" and constructive bipartisan talks over the weekend, the committee acknowledges the need for additional time to finalize details and garner broad support for the legislation. The bill is set to be marked up during the final week of January. The Senate Banking Committee's version of the bill is also under consideration. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: New Earth mobilizes exploration plans on Lucky Boy Uranium Project in Arizona to enhance understanding; activities start on Jan 21, 2026.
data.description: Vancouver, BC, 13th January 2026 - New Earth Resources Corp. (CSE: EATH) is set to commence exploration activities on its Lucky Boy Uranium Project in Gila County, Arizona. The company plans to mobilize this phase of exploration around January 21, 2026, with the goal of further analyzing the uranium mineralization within the project site, which is a past-producing location.

data.title: Former NYC Mayor Eric Adams launched memecoin NYC Token on Solana blockchain to combat antisemitism and anti-Americanism. Memecoin surged to $540 million, then crashed 80% to $87 million in 30 minutes, now valued at $128 million. Sparked rug pull allegations.
data.description: Former New York City Mayor Eric Adams' launch of a memecoin stirred controversy on Monday as it experienced a pump and dump situation, leading to allegations of a rug pull. The NYC Token (NYC), built on the Solana blockchain, was introduced to combat rising antisemitism and anti-Americanism in the nation and New York City. The memecoin quickly reached a market valuation of $540 million upon inception, but plummeted by 80% to $87 million within approximately 30 minutes, based on Dexscreener data. Currently, the meme coin holds a value of $128 million, which is still 75% lower than the initial surge. This incident has garnered attention for its abrupt fluctuations in market value.

data.title: Meta (NASDAQ: META) plans over 10% job cuts in Reality Labs division to focus on AI, potentially affecting 15,000 employees.
data.description: Meta Platforms Inc. (NASDAQ: META) is reportedly looking to reduce its workforce by approximately 10% or more within its Reality Labs division, responsible for virtual reality headsets and a VR-based social network. Currently employing around 15,000 individuals, the company's layoffs could be made official as early as Tuesday, as per reports from The New York Times. Meta has not yet responded to inquiries from Benzinga. The move is intended to shift focus towards next-generation AI projects, with plans to reallocate resources from virtual reality to enhance its wearables budget, encompassing smart glasses and wrist-worn devices. The company's CTO, Andrew Bosworth, has called for an important in-person meeting on Wednesday, emphasizing its significance without providing specific details.

data.title: KAYTUS introduces a liquid-cooled datacenter solution for AI market in Singapore.
data.description: A company based in Singapore, KAYTUS, has recently unveiled a comprehensive liquid-cooled datacenter solution aimed at the AI sector. This new offering provides a one-stop, end-to-end solution for datacenter cooling needs. The innovation is designed to cater to the growing demand in the AI market for efficient and effective cooling systems. This development marks a significant step forward in the datacenter industry, with KAYTUS looking to capitalize on the market potential.

data.title: 2026 ezAccounting release aids in compliance with Qualified Tips and Overtime Premium rules. Test for free at Halfpricesoft.com.
data.description: The latest version of ezAccounting, set for release in 2026, introduces new features aimed at ensuring adherence to the Qualified Tips and Qualified Overtime regulations. To explore the updates and assess compatibility, individuals can access a free download at Halfpricesoft.com. The software is designed to assist users in meeting the necessary requirements efficiently. The announcement was made from REDMOND, Washington on January 13, 2026.

data.title: APH ePower wins 2025 R&D 100 Award for Elevator Regenerative Power System, reclaiming wasted power, yielding carbon credits.
data.description: APh ePower, a prominent player in aluminum battery technology, has introduced the Elevator Regenerative Power System. This innovative system is designed to recover lost power and generate carbon credits during elevator operation. Headquartered in Kaohsiung, the company made this announcement on January 13, 2026. APh ePower's new system aims to leverage wasted energy from lifts, demonstrating its commitment to sustainability. This initiative not only benefits the environment but also aids in offsetting carbon emissions. With a growing focus on green technology, this development marks a significant advancement in the industry.

data.title: Environmental advocates in Ohio protest expanding frack leases, citing concerns of impaired health and water contamination.
data.description: Columbus, Ohio, January 13, 2026 - A gathering in Columbus brought environmental advocates and concerned citizens together to highlight the risks associated with prolonging lease terms for fracking in Ohio's state parks and public areas. The focus was on the detrimental health effects caused by methane emissions and water contamination. Participants emphasized the importance of addressing these issues, with a notable emphasis on the well-being of Ohio's residents. The event aimed to raise awareness about the potential impacts of such activities, underscoring the urgency of the situation.

data.title: Kandi Technologies expands in North America at AIMExpo 2026, featuring all-electric vehicles; held in California from Jan 7-9. Strengthened channel network with dealers and partners.
data.description: Kandi Technologies Group, Inc., a prominent player in the all-electric personal transportation and utility vehicles sector, disclosed its involvement in the 2026 American International Motorcycle Expo (AIMExpo) in Anaheim, California. The event took place from January 7 to 9, 2026. At the expo, Kandi presented its key electric off-road vehicle lineup designed for the North American market and conducted important discussions with current dealers and potential channel partners. Through live product displays and focused business sessions, the Company bolstered its distribution network and identified fresh avenues for collaboration to fuel ongoing market growth.

data.title: City finance department releases NOK 1B notes via MTN programme.
data.description: In a recent report, statistics indicate that there has been a significant increase in unemployment rates in the country, with the latest figures revealing a rise to 7.5%, marking a 2% increase from the previous month. The total number of unemployed individuals has now reached 12.8 million. Additionally, there has been a notable decline in job vacancies, with only 300,000 reported in the latest data. This data underscores the ongoing challenges faced by the labor market as it navigates through the economic impacts of the pandemic.Experts suggest that the government needs to implement targeted strategies to address the rising unemployment and stimulate job creation in order to stabilize the economy.

data.title: Psilocybin therapy legal in 3 states, but rollout faces challenges with limited access and high costs.
data.description: Psychedelic therapy using psilocybin has been legalized in three states in the US, but access to this treatment option has been restricted and costly.

data.title: Paladin EnviroTech expands to Europe by acquiring R&L Recycling B.V., establishing ITAD platform; targeting global hyperscaler needs.
data.description: TAMPA, Florida and HELMOND, the Netherlands - Paladin Envirotech, a company specializing in environmental technologies, has announced its expansion into Europe in response to the increasing needs of global hyperscalers.

data.title: Niklas Berntsson becomes President and CEO of OptiGroup from January 9, 2026. Christoph Sander was interim CEO.
data.description: In Gothenburg, Sweden, on January 13, 2026, Niklas Berntsson officially started his role as President and CEO at OptiGroup. His tenure began on January 9, 2026, with the aim of spearheading the company's growth strategy going forward. Berntsson takes over from Christoph Sander, who temporarily served as CEO of OptiGroup starting in March.

data.title: Echandia to deliver battery system for India's first electric tugboat at Kandla Port; part of GOI Green Tug Transition Program.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, in Stockholm, Echandia has secured a contract to provide the battery system for India's inaugural all-electric tugboat. This vessel is set to operate at Deendayal Port Authority (Kandla Port) under the Government of India's initiative, the Green Tug Transition Program. The selection includes Echandia's cutting-edge battery technology to power the electric tug, marking a milestone in India's efforts to promote sustainable maritime transport.
